title: Enter the Guild
signIn: Enter the guild to begin your adventure
forgotPasswordInstructions: Enter the raven address you use to enter your guild membership
forgotPasswordSendEmail: We'll dispatch a raven with instructions to choose a new secret passphrase.
twoFactorTitle: Enter Your Dual Authentication Rite Code!
twoFactorInstructions: Use your configured authenticator to obtain a code and enter it here.
emailVerificationInstructions: Enter the security rune code sent to your raven address.
noAccountYet: Don't have a guild membership yet?
welcomeBack: Welcome back to our ever-growing Guild of Adventurers
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid raven address
pleaseEnterGiftcard: Please enter a gift rune number
invalidCode: Invalid rune code, please enter the correct code.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: Dual authentication is enabled for this guild membership. Enter your authenticator code to finish entering the guild.

oauth.verifyEmailSent: A verification rune code has been dispatched to your raven address.
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter raven address and secret passphrase
